/home/runner/work/Open1722/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/acf-vss-talker.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/acf-vss-talker.dir/acf-vss-talker.c.o" -o acf-vss-talker  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/Open1722/Open1722/_codeql_build_dir/src: ../../src/libopen1722.so.0.1.0 ../../src/libopen1722custom.so.0.1.0 ../libopen1722examples.a
